CREATE TABLE test_strings (id UInt32, text String) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, 'ClickHouse® is a column-oriented database management system (DBMS) for online analytical processing of queries (OLAP).');
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (2, 'ClickHouse is designed for fast querying and high performance.');
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (3, 'ClickHouse® is a column-oriented DBMS for OLAP.');
SELECT id, wordShingleSimHashCaseInsensitiveUTF8(text, 4) AS Hash FROM test_strings WHERE id < 3;
SELECT t1.id, wordShingleSimHashCaseInsensitiveUTF8(t1.text, 2) AS Hash FROM test_strings t1 JOIN test_strings t2 ON t1.id != t2.id;
SELECT wordShingleSimHashCaseInsensitiveUTF8(CONCAT(text, ' - Additional text.'), 5) AS Hash FROM test_strings;
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (4, 'Another distinct string for simhash testing.');

SELECT id, wordShingleSimHashCaseInsensitiveUTF8(text, 3) AS Hash FROM test_strings WHERE wordShingleSimHashCaseInsensitiveUTF8(text, 3) = wordShingleSimHashCaseInsensitiveUTF8('ClickHouse is a column-oriented DBMS for OLAP.', 3);
SELECT DISTINCT wordShingleSimHashCaseInsensitiveUTF8(text, 1) AS Hash FROM test_strings;
SELECT count(*) FROM (SELECT wordShingleSimHashCaseInsensitiveUTF8(text) AS Hash FROM test_strings GROUP BY Hash HAVING count(*) > 1);
SELECT wordShingleSimHashCaseInsensitiveUTF8(text, 25) AS Hash FROM test_strings WHERE LENGTH(text) > 0;
SELECT text, wordShingleSimHashCaseInsensitiveUTF8(text, 3) AS Hash FROM test_strings ORDER BY Hash;
